title: Let The Rivers Sing

sections.label: Intro
lines: Generate with warm tones and minimal high-frequency emphasis.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sing a new song, for wonders abound,
The Lord has triumphed, His love profound.
With holy arm and righteous might,
He brings salvation, the world’s delight.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Make a joyful noise, all the earth,
Lift your voice for His endless worth.
Let rivers clap, let mountains sing,
Praise the Lord, our eternal King.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: He has remembered His mercy and grace,
Revealed His love to every place.
The nations see, the ends of the earth,
His salvation, His glorious birth.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Trumpets sound, the oceans roar,
Fields rejoice on every shore.
The heavens declare, creation cries,
Glory to God who reigns on high.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Make a joyful noise, all the earth,
Lift your voice for His endless worth.
Let rivers clap, let mountains sing,
Praise the Lord, our eternal King.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Sing a new song, for wonders abound,
The Lord reigns, with love profound.

epigraph: Make a joyful noise unto the LORD
styleNote: Warm Harmonies Hum Gently · Uplifting Harmonies · Layered Vocals
